form.formComment: Drawn inside box. At the last start finished 6th in a T3 Grade 6 on April 6 over 390m at Ballarat behind Blame Karissa beaten 6 lengths (22.77). Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 8 over 350m at Healesville behind Miss Sooky beaten 2.25 lengths (19.89) in a Bottom Up - Grade 6. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 12 length seventh over 410m at Horsham. Prepared to overlook.
